title: Living in Boulder vlog 4 - 1 - 2017: 2,500 kilometer diameter backgrounds

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a late-night vlog entry for April 1, 2017, noting he woke up at 11am and stayed up until 2:30am. He describes working on a 'race distance grid' or 'circle grid' project involving geographic distances, which he expects to finish the next day, and briefly mentions starting a Google Analytics tutorial.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Very excited about it; sees it as a tool for understanding size, scale, and how political/cultural groupings form
Aware he is on a consistent late-night schedule but not concerned about it
